title: Generate column names instead of labels
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table_1 (id Int32, name String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
CREATE TABLE test_table_2 AS SELECT id, name FROM test_table_1 WHERE id > 0 ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM test_table_2;
key_bug_features: Generate column names instead of labels in queries
